query:
-- جدول جلسات المستأجر
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id INT NOT NULL,
  contract_id INT NOT NULL,
  access_token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  expires_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  INDEX idx_token (access_token),
  INDEX idx_tenant (tenant_id)
);

-- جدول وثائق المستأجر
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id INT NOT NULL,
  contract_id INT NOT NULL,
  file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  file_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_key VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  doc_type VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'other',
  uploaded_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  INDEX idx_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_contract (contract_id)
);

-- جدول مفاتيح API
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_keys (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  key_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  key_prefix VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  permissions JSON,
  is_active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  last_used_at BIGINT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  revoked_at BIGINT,
  INDEX idx_key_hash (key_hash),
  INDEX idx_active (is_active)
);

-- جدول الإعلانات العقارية
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_listings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  property_id INT NOT NULL,
  unit_id INT,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  listing_type ENUM('rent', 'sale') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'rent',
  price DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'paused', 'rented', 'sold') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  auto_published TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  contact_phone VARCHAR(50),
  contact_whatsapp VARCHAR(50),
  views_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  inquiries_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  published_at BIGINT,
  expires_at BIGINT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  INDEX idx_property (property_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_type (listing_type)
);

-- جدول سجل التصدير المحاسبي
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounting_exports (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  export_type ENUM('quickbooks', 'odoo', 'sap', 'excel') NOT NULL,
  date_from BIGINT NOT NULL,
  date_to BIGINT NOT NULL,
  records_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  file_url TEXT,
  file_key VARCHAR(500),
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'completed',
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
);
